leadText: Pungent Root (Japanese: みずべのハーブ Waterside Herb) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Though carelessly picked, these herbs can add a fragrant accent to a dish.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh $ 950 $ 475 Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Though carelessly picked, these herbs can add a fragrant accent to a dish. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh Hidden recurring item ( East Lake Axewell , West Lake Axewell , Motostoke Riverbank , Bridge Field , Dusty Bowl , Giant's Mirror , Giant's Cap ) Possible gift after cooking curry Sw Sh IA Hidden recurring item ( Soothing Wetlands ) Sw Sh CT Hidden recurring item ( Giant's Bed , Giant's Foot , Ballimere Lake )

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Pungent Root resembles the wasabi root, which is grated into a paste and used as a condiment in Japanese cuisine, such as sushi. An ingredient known as Wasabi was introduced in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet .
